subcodes.first_line: O thou seeker of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. It is impossible to organize the House of Justice in these days… According to the explicit text of the Most Holy Book the amounts offered for the Huquq should be deposited
subcodes.first_line_orig: و حقوق را به موجب نصوص کتاب اقدس جمع نمایید در محلّی و صرف مواقع لازمه نمایید ولی به کسی
subcodes.subjects: @law of Huququ'llah, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @elections, @House of Justice
